title: Senior SEO Specialist at Dunzo International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Dunzo International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Dunzo International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Indore-based team.

About Dunzo International Enterprises:
Dunzo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo International Enterprises!
